details.test: Task 1: Save three highly rated teen parenting articles to reading list
Task 2: Register for cheapest evening family workshop within 25 miles of 30301 next month
Task 3: One-time $35 donation to Marriage Support Programs with email updates
Task 4: Sign Texas parental rights in education petition with custom message
Task 5: Save more downloaded policy brief between Screen Time and Social Media Safety
Task 6: Create Family Night Plan for ages 6–10 with two short videos and optional PDF guide
Task 7: Subscribe to newsletter with exactly three topics (including Parenting Teens) and weekly frequency
Task 8: Save two sliding-scale family counseling partners within 50 miles of 10001
Task 9: Complete Family Values self-assessment and save recommended guide
